word: G174 - ἀκάνθινος - akánthinos - ak-an'-thee-nos - Of thorns

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀκάνθινος

- Transliteration: Akanthinos

- Phonetic: ak-an'-thee-nos

- Definition:

1. thorny, woven out of twigs of a thorny plant

- Origin: from G173

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G173; thorny: - of thorns.
